features.name: prepassage_action_moves_y_toward_gap_center
features.source:
def f57(s, a):
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_right = s[19] + s[27] + s[3]
    r = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + r
    gap_upper = s[30] - r
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    left_of_wall = (robot_x + s[3] < wall_x)
    not_aligned = (robot_y < gap_lower) or (robot_y > gap_upper)
    dy = a[1]
    toward = ((robot_y < gap_center) and (dy > 0)) or ((robot_y > gap_center) and (dy < 0))
    return left_of_wall and not_aligned and toward

features.name: prepassage_alignfirst_dx_small_dy_toward_gap_center
features.source:
def f59(s, a):
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_right = s[19] + s[27] + s[3]
    r = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + r
    gap_upper = s[30] - r
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    left_of_wall = (robot_x + s[3] < wall_x)
    not_aligned = (robot_y < gap_lower) or (robot_y > gap_upper)
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    dx_small = abs(dx) < 0.02
    toward = ((robot_y < gap_center) and (dy > 0)) or ((robot_y > gap_center) and (dy < 0))
    return left_of_wall and not_aligned and dx_small and toward

features.name: crossing_aligned_dx_positive_dy_small
features.source:
def f62(s, a):
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_right = s[19] + s[27] + s[3]
    r = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + r
    gap_upper = s[30] - r
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    left_of_wall = (robot_x + s[3] < wall_x)
    aligned = (robot_y >= gap_lower) and (robot_y <= gap_upper)
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    dx_pos = dx > 0.01
    dy_small = abs(dy) < 0.02
    return left_of_wall and aligned and dx_pos and dy_small

features.name: crossing_aligned_dx_negative
features.source:
def f64(s, a):
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_right = s[19] + s[27] + s[3]
    r = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + r
    gap_upper = s[30] - r
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    left_of_wall = (robot_x + s[3] < wall_x)
    aligned = (robot_y >= gap_lower) and (robot_y <= gap_upper)
    dx = a[0]
    dx_neg = dx < -0.01
    return left_of_wall and aligned and dx_neg

features.name: insidepassage_next_y_in_gap_dx_positive
features.source:
def f65(s, a):
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_right = s[19] + s[27] + s[3]
    r = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + r
    gap_upper = s[30] - r
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    inside_passage = (robot_x >= wall_x) and (robot_x < wall_right)
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    next_y = robot_y + dy
    in_gap = (next_y >= gap_lower) and (next_y <= gap_upper)
    dx_pos = dx > 0.01
    return inside_passage and in_gap and dx_pos

    return inside_passage and out_gap and dx_pos

features.name: postpassage_action_reduces_dist_to_target
features.source:
def f68(s, a):
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_right = s[19] + s[27] + s[3]
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2.0
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2.0
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    passed_wall = (robot_x >= wall_right)
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    next_x = robot_x + dx
    next_y = robot_y + dy
    dist_now = abs(robot_x - target_cx) + abs(robot_y - target_cy)
    dist_next = abs(next_x - target_cx) + abs(next_y - target_cy)
    return passed_wall and (dist_next < dist_now)

features.name: postpassage_action_increases_dist_to_target
features.source:
def f69(s, a):
    wall_x = s[19]
    wall_right = s[19] + s[27] + s[3]
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2.0
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2.0
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    passed_wall = (robot_x >= wall_right)
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    next_x = robot_x + dx
    next_y = robot_y + dy
    dist_now = abs(robot_x - target_cx) + abs(robot_y - target_cy)
    dist_next = abs(next_x - target_cx) + abs(next_y - target_cy)
    return passed_wall and (dist_next > dist_now)

features.name: robot_left_of_target_center
features.source:
def f70(s, a):
    target_cx = s[9] + s[17] / 2.0
    target_cy = s[10] + s[18] / 2.0
    robot_x = s[0]
    return robot_x < target_cx

features.name: robot_inside_target_region
features.source:
def f71(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_w = s[17]
    target_h = s[18]
    inside_x = (robot_x >= target_x) and (robot_x <= target_x + target_w)
    inside_y = (robot_y >= target_y) and (robot_y <= target_y + target_h)
    return inside_x and inside_y

features.name: action_dx_toward_target_center
action_moves_toward_gap_center_y
features.source:
def f73(s, a):
    r = s[3]
    gap_lower = s[20] + s[28] + r
    gap_upper = s[30] - r
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    robot_y = s[1]
    dy = a[1]
    toward = ((robot_y < gap_center) and (dy > 0)) or ((robot_y > gap_center) and (dy < 0))
    return toward

    away = ((robot_y < gap_center) and (dy < 0)) or ((robot_y > gap_center) and (dy > 0))
    return away

features.name: action_mostly_forward
action_mostly_upward
action_small_translation
features.source:
def f77(s, a):
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    mag = (dx * dx + dy * dy) ** 0.5
    return mag < 0.05

features.name: action_large_translation
features.source:
def f78(s, a):
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    mag = (dx * dx + dy * dy) ** 0.5
    return mag > 0.1
